prompt_bullets: Linker needs `asn_DEF_F1AP_LTMConfigurationIDMapping_Item` → the defining **`F1AP_LTMConfigurationIDMapping_Item.c`** must be compiled into `libasn1_*`. In OAI, the list of generated `.c` files is usually in **`.../MESSAGES/ASN1/<protocol>-<release>.cmake`** (e.g. `f1ap-18.6.0.cmake`), not only top-level `CMakeLists.txt`.

Log points to **`openair2/F1AP/MESSAGES/libasn1_f1ap.a`** → inspect **`openair2/F1AP/MESSAGES/ASN1/`** for **`f1ap-*.cmake`** (or similarly named) that list generated ASN.1 `.c` files for that library; patch the file list there if a `.c` is missing.

fix_suggestion.reason: Linker undefined reference to asn_DEF_* — added missing generated `.c` to the ASN.1 bundle source list in the matching `*.cmake` file.
fix_suggestion.config_fix: Ensure the generated ASN.1 source file for the missing type is listed under `f1ap_source` / `ngap_source` in the protocol bundle `.cmake`.

config_patches.description: Add generated ASN.1 sources `F1AP_LTMConfigurationIDMapping_Item.c` so linker symbols `asn_DEF_F1AP_LTMConfigurationIDMapping_Item` are included in libasn1.

fix_suggestion.root_cause_analysis: The static archive was linked without the object file that defines the ASN.1 descriptor for the missing type — usually because the generated `.c` was not listed in the bundle CMake source list.
investigation_steps: Save the `.cmake` change, reconfigure if needed, and rebuild the target that links `libasn1_*`.
